calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Ronald Arlas appearing for plaintiff. Kevin Sullivan, Esquire, appearing as limited scope attorney.

Richard Rehl, plaintiff's representative. Daniel Garcia is present.

Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation set forth on the record. Plaintiff to have possession of the premises located at 22 Terra Vista, #E-2, San Francisco, Ca. A Writ of Possession may issue re eviction on July 27, 2005 if the defendant has not vacated the premises by 5 pm on July 26, 2005, Back rent and damages for the apartment and garage total $8644.96 (Back apt. rent from 11-01-04 thru 7-6-05 and garage rent from 2-1-05 thru 7-6-05), court costs in the amount of $256.20 for a total money judgment of $8,901.26. Plaintiff hold a security deposit in the amount of $1,175.00. Upon a walk through and a vacating of the premises, security deposit may be allocated to damages and then the money judgment. Premises must be left broom clean. "Stay" terms set forth on the record. See record for more detailed terms of the agreement. Plaintiff to submit a form of judgment, approved as to content and form, to the court for signature.

Tom Maxwell, Judge Pro Tem. G. Peerless, clk., J. Bryce, csr
